CMake script to configure and link the JerryScript library for an mbed target with Cortex-M4 CPU.

# Purpose
This configuration file is used to set up the build environment for a software module named `jerry`. It specifies the application name using the `set` command to define `MBEDMODULE` as `jerry`. The file includes the directory path for `jerry-core` by setting `LJCORE` to a relative path and adding it to the include directories. It also defines specific compile flags for the C compiler, targeting a Cortex-M4 processor with little-endian and thumb mode options. Additionally, the file sets up linking for the `jerryscript` by defining the path `LJPATH` to the library directory and listing the necessary library files `libjerrylibm.a` and `libjerrycore.a` to be linked with the `jerry` module.
